channel.title: Buy or sell on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Buy or sell on Tech Tracker

item.title: Remint - A digital currency to rent, buy or sell real estate properties.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-W3vOrkQnZIE/Y77fpfSsUMI/AAAAAAAAQVA/__NcFIEo1rEkZ6G_duRDdMOZ6c6Ifv__gCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1673453471785601-0.png" alt=""> Real estate is basically name of industry in which people rent, buy or sell properties like normal or agriculture lands, houses, apartments, villas, mansions etc, since ancient times land properties basically assets always had huge value as they are necessary for people in this world to live conveniently and comfortably back then there is no name for this business in whole but eventually it is named as real estate.
